- [ ] Security enhancement

## Checklist

<!-- Mark completed items with an 'x' -->

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have removed any console.log() or debug code

### Documentation
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have updated the README.md (if needed)
- [ ] I have added/updated code comments
- [ ] I have updated CHANGELOG.md (if applicable)

### Testing
- [ ] I have tested my changes thoroughly
- [ ] I have tested edge cases
- [ ] I have tested error scenarios
- [ ] All existing tests still pass

### Security
- [ ] My changes don't introduce security vulnerabilities
- [ ] I have validated all user inputs
- [ ] I have not committed any sensitive data (API keys, credentials, etc.)
- [ ] I have reviewed the code for common security issues (XSS, injection, etc.)
- [ ] Security scan passes without new vulnerabilities

### Configuration
- [ ] I have updated .env.example (if new config is needed)
- [ ] I have documented any new script properties
- [ ] Breaking changes are clearly documented
